section.p: Carbon-emission analysis, environmental goal monitoring and departmental sustainability intelligence.

div.p: Main sustainability indicators for the selected reporting period.
Distribution across Scope 1, Scope 2 and Scope 3.

td.t-att-class: 'eco_scope_1' if scope_item['key'] == 'scope_1' else ( 'eco_scope_2' if scope_item['key'] == 'scope_2' else 'eco_scope_3' )

t.div: No monthly emission data is available.

div.p: Departments ranked by total carbon emissions.

t.div: No emission source analysis is available.

div.p: Goal progress, status and risk level.

t.div: No carbon transactions matched the selected filters.

footer.div: EcoPulse ESG — Environmental Sustainability Management Platform
